name: shippo
description: Ship packages with Shippo. Multi-carrier rate shopping, label generation, package tracking, address validation, customs declarations, and batch processing from CSV files.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-carrier shipping: rates, labels, tracking, address validation.
interface.longDescription: Bundles Shippo's shipping skills (rate shopping, label purchase, tracking, address validation, batch shipping, shipping analysis, best-practices, SDK upgrades) and wires the remote Shippo MCP server over Streamable HTTP with per-user Shippo OAuth.
defaultPrompt: Use Shippo to compare carrier rates and buy the cheapest label.
Track this Shippo shipment and summarize its delivery status.
